title: calanthe labrosa
intro: Calanthe labrosa, also known as the lip orchid or lip-flowered orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family. Traditionally, Calanthe labrosa is used in herbal medicine for its potential medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Calanthe labrosa include its ability to aid in the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to soothe digestive problems. Calanthe labrosa can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
